channel.title: Reliability on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Reliability on jamesm.blog

item.title: AI Hallucinations: Understanding and Mitigating False Outputs
item.description: What hallucinations actually are, why the word is a slightly misleading import from psychiatry, why no model will ever stop producing them entirely, and the small set of techniques that genuinely move the dial on false outputs in production.

item.title: AI Reliability Is Weird: Why Testing LLMs Breaks Everything You Know
item.description: Traditional testing methods are failing in the age of autonomous AI agents. We need a new approach to ensure reliability when the 'builder' is non-deterministic.
